title: RealTimeClockUz
description: Displays real-world system time on the Minecraft HUD with timezone support and ModMenu settings.
body:
# 🕒 RealTimeClockUz – Multi Time HUD Clock UZ, EN, RU

---

# O'zbek

## 🕒 RealTimeClockUz – Multi Time HUD soati

**RealTimeClockUz** — bu Minecraft uchun **Fabric client mod** bo‘lib, o‘yin ichida **bir nechta real vaqt zonalarini (multi-time)** HUD’da ko‘rsatadi. Endi siz bir vaqtning o‘zida turli davlatlar vaqtini kuzatishingiz mumkin.

Misol:
Tashkent: 21:30  
London:   17:30  
Tokyo:    01:30  

`version` `license`

## ⚙ Texnik talablar (minimal)

- Minecraft **1.20.1+ (latest gacha qo‘llab-quvvatlanadi)**
- **Fabric Loader**
- **Fabric API**
- **ModMenu**
- **Cloth Config**

## ✨ Asosiy imkoniyatlar

- ✅ Bir nechta vaqt zonalarini HUD’da ko‘rsatadi
- ✅ Default zonalar:
  - Asia/Tashkent
  - Europe/London
  - Asia/Tokyo
- ✅ Vaqt zonalarni qo‘shish / o‘chirish mumkin
- ✅ **ModMenu orqali to‘liq sozlash**
- ✅ 12h / 24h format tanlash
- ✅ Soniyalarni yoqish / o‘chirish
- ✅ HUD joylashuvini sozlash (4 burchak)
- ✅ X / Y offset sozlamalari
- ✅ Har bir vaqt uchun custom nom berish mumkin
- ✅ Lokalizatsiya qo‘llab-quvvatlanadi:
  - O'zbek
  - English
  - Русский

## 🛠 O‘rnatish

1. **Fabric Loader** o‘rnating  
2. **Fabric API** o‘rnating  
3. **ModMenu** o‘rnating  
4. **Cloth Config** o‘rnating  
5. `RealTimeClockUz.jar` faylini **mods/** papkaga joylashtiring  
6. O‘yinni ishga tushiring  

## ⚙ Sozlamalar

Mod avtomatik quyidagi config faylni yaratadi:

config/realtimeclock.json

Bu yerda quyidagilarni sozlash mumkin:

- Timezone ro‘yxati
- HUD joylashuvi
- X / Y offset
- 12h / 24h format
- Soniyalarni ko‘rsatish

Shuningdek sozlamalarni **ModMenu orqali o‘yin ichida ham o‘zgartirish mumkin**.

## 🚀 Qo‘shimcha imkoniyatlar

- ⚡ Har bir vaqt alohida qatorda chiqadi
- ⚡ Sekundiga 1 marta yangilanadi (lag yo‘q)
- ⚡ Yengil va optimallashtirilgan

## ❓ Yordam

Savol yoki muammo bo‘lsa:

📬 Telegram: **@SarvarGamer_YT**

## 🧑‍💻 Muallif

👨‍💻 Developer: **SarvarDev**

## 📜 Litsenziya

**MIT License** – litsenziyasi bo'yicha litsenziyalangan.

---

# English

## 🕒 RealTimeClockUz – Multi Time HUD Clock

**RealTimeClockUz** is a lightweight **Fabric client-side mod** that allows you to display **multiple real-world timezones on the Minecraft HUD at the same time**.

Example:
Tashkent: 21:30  
London:   17:30  
Tokyo:    01:30  

`version` `license`

## ⚙ Technical Requirements (Minimum)

- Minecraft **1.20.1+ (up to latest)**
- **Fabric Loader**
- **Fabric API**
- **ModMenu**
- **Cloth Config**

## ✨ Main Features

- ✅ Displays multiple timezones on the HUD
- ✅ Default timezones:
  - Asia/Tashkent
  - Europe/London
  - Asia/Tokyo
- ✅ Add / remove timezones dynamically
- ✅ Full **ModMenu configuration**
- ✅ 12h / 24h format toggle
- ✅ Optional seconds display
- ✅ Configurable HUD position (4 corners)
- ✅ X / Y offset settings
- ✅ Custom labels for each timezone
- ✅ Localization support:
  - Uzbek
  - English
  - Russian

## 🛠 Installation

1. Install **Fabric Loader**  
2. Install **Fabric API**  
3. Install **ModMenu**  
4. Install **Cloth Config**  
5. Put `RealTimeClockUz.jar` into your **mods/** folder  
6. Launch the game  

## ⚙ Configuration

The mod automatically creates:

config/realtimeclock.json

You can configure:

- Timezone list
- HUD position
- X / Y offset
- 12h / 24h format
- Seconds display

All settings can also be changed via **ModMenu in-game**.

## 🚀 Extra Features

- ⚡ Each timezone is displayed on a separate line
- ⚡ Updates once per second (optimized)
- ⚡ Lightweight and performance-friendly

## ❓ Support

If you have any questions or issues:

📬 Telegram: **@SarvarGamer_YT**

## 🧑‍💻 Author

Developer: **SarvarDev**
